selection_rationale: The negative-fuck lineage had two independent exposed seeds with an above-baseline step-2 node and a nondecreasing step-2-to-step-4 transition. It was frozen before the new seed's step-6 outcome. The unobserved step-3 node makes the confirmatory 0/2/3/4 curve prospective rather than copied from a favorable observed path.

prospective_confirmation.curve_criterion: M2 > M0, M3 >= M2, and M4 >= M3 on the four-treatment-seed mean
prospective_confirmation.matched_signflip_rule: Change the sole score-component weight from -1.0 to +1.0 and preserve every other training setting within each seed.
prospective_confirmation.primary_test: exact two-sided four-seed sign test on matched treatment-minus-signflip effects; require 4 positive, 0 negative, 0 ties, p=0.125
prospective_confirmation.secondary_test: exact two-sided four-seed sign test on treatment-minus-base effects; require 4 positive, 0 negative, 0 ties, p=0.125

interpretation_boundary: All source curves above are exposed adaptive development evidence. Only the newly registered seeds, matched controls, and still-unopened final collection can support the alpha-0.15 claim.
